name: Railway
description: Railway cloud deployment platform for apps and databases

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Railway
2. Go to Account Settings → Tokens
3. Create a new token (choose Account token for full access)
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Railway → Account Settings → Tokens → Create a new token

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies Railway is connected and confirms the authenticated user identity

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Railway platform is accessible and lists projects
